plugins.name: japan-public-business-intelligence
plugins.description: Japanese public business intelligence: corporate registries (gBizINFO), government subsidies (J-Grants), and AI-citable evidence via the Kokai Data MCP server.

plugins.name: meeting-prep-jp
plugins.description: Prepare a 1-page cited pre-meeting brief for a Japanese company.

plugins.name: subsidy-fit-jp
plugins.description: 3-axis fit signal (regional / industry / scale) for a Japanese company x subsidy pair.

plugins.name: due-diligence-jp
plugins.description: 1-page due diligence brief on a Japanese company from public canonical sources.

plugins.name: competitor-brief-jp
plugins.description: 3-tier competitor brief (overview / scale / certifications) for a Japanese company.

plugins.name: subsidy-landscape-jp
plugins.description: Top-N Japanese subsidies for an industry or use-purpose theme.
